---
name: user-story-writing
description: Provides best practices and templates for writing clear, testable user stories.
version: 1.0
---

# User Story Writing Skill

## Purpose

- Ensure user stories are outcome-focused, testable, and user-centric.
- Align user stories with the feature template in `/refs/1-template-feature.md`.

## Structure

- Use the format: As a [user type], I want to [do something] so that [goal].
- Place user stories in the User Stories section of the feature spec.

## Guidelines

- Write from the user’s perspective.
- Focus on the user's needs and the value delivered.

## Best Practices

- Make each story testable and specific.
- Keep stories concise and outcome-focused.

## Do's and Don'ts

- **Do:** Use the standard format for every story.
- **Do:** Link stories to features and acceptance criteria.
- **Don't:** Write vague or untestable stories.
- **Don't:** Mix multiple user needs in one story.

## How to Use

- Reference this skill and the feature template when writing or reviewing user stories.

## Example

- As an admin, I want to reset user passwords so that I can help users regain access.
